observation.summary: Provider runtime responsibility docs were labeled SSOT, but only provider-event-draft had executable generation and source-anchored verification.

hypothesis.summary: A runtime-responsibility manifest can generate the responsibility pages and verify C3/C4/C5 boundary anchors in code and tests.

execution.summary: Generate the runtime responsibility index and detail pages from SSOT fragments while keeping provider-event-draft as related evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, missing source anchors, missing workflow wiring, and detached provider draft evidence.

retrospective.summary: Runtime responsibility docs now follow Observe -> Hypothesis -> Execute -> Evaluate -> Retrospective and reduce provider-runtime manual surface.

evidence.proves: runtime responsibility docs are generated and source anchors still exist
related provider event draft mapping remains independently verified
public CI uploads provider runtime responsibility evidence
